meaning: n.彩虹,五彩缤纷的排列,幻想,幻觉,虚无缥缈的东西adj.五彩缤纷的
examples: The second rainbow will be bigger than the first, and directly above it.
New Zealand's quarrel with France over the Rainbow Warrior incident was formally ended.
Lapus Lapus Island, an easy dive for beginners, has variegated soft corals, spiny lionfish and rainbow-coloured nudibranches (molluscs).
Cablevision plans to spin off its Rainbow Media subsidiary, as publicly-traded AMC Networks, later this year.
